---
title: "Pseudotime Analysis with Slingshot"
author: "Johannes Schöneich"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

# Load Required Libraries
```{r libraries}
#library(monocle3)
library(Seurat)
library(stringr)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(scCustomize)
library(tidyverse)
library(SeuratExtend)
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(openxlsx)
```

# Define Paths and Load Helpers
```{r paths}
# Set working directories
harddrive <- "H:/231248/NTFS_3.64TB"
#harddrive <- "/media/johannes/EXTERNAL_USB/231248/NTFS_3.64TB"

source(file.path(harddrive,"helper_functions.R"))
source(file.path(harddrive,"scrna_datasets/save_load_helper.R"))
source(file.path(harddrive,"scrna_datasets/single_cell_themes.R"))

analysis_folder <- file.path(
  harddrive,
  "scrna_datasets/scrna_full_both_d25_mito_filter_inf",
  "scrna_full_both_d25_mito100_inf"
)

plots_folder <- file.path(harddrive,"pseudotime/noc2_no11/plots")
dir.create(plots_folder)

charts_folder <- file.path(harddrive,
                           "dorothea_2025/all_stages/analysis/charts")
```

# Load Seurat Object
```{r load-seurat}
# Example object
scrna <- load_object(
  file.path(analysis_folder,"scrna_full_filtered_uninf.Rds"))

# Define color palettes
TA_col <- Hue_Pal(5)
TA_col <- append(TA_col,"#F17D50", after = 5)

Idents(scrna) <- "int_0.3_broad_TA"


# Define the folder path for Enterocyte datasets
ent_folder <- file.path(
  harddrive,
  "subsets/subsets_2025/save/noc2_no11/ent"  
)

#enterocyte reclustered
ent_reclust <- load_object(file.path(
  ent_folder, 
  "scrna_ent_uninf.Rds" 
))

# Define the folder path for Enterocyte datasets
gob_folder <- file.path(
  harddrive,
  "subsets/subsets_2025/save/noc2/gob/"  
)

#enterocyte reclustered
scrna_goblet <- load_object(file.path(
  gob_folder, 
  "scrna_gob_uninf.Rds" 
))

tf_csv <- read.csv(file.path(charts_folder, "acts_decoupler_scrna_size5.csv"))
```

# slingshot pseudotime 
```{r}
plots_folder <- file.path(harddrive,"pseudotime/noc2_no11/plots/",
                          "slingshot_agewise/v3")
dir.create(plots_folder)

# Example subsets by stage
timepoints <- c("d01", "d05", "d10", "d25")
groupings <- list(
  "d05_d10"   = c("d05", "d10"),
  "preweaning" = c("d01", "d05", "d10")
)

#we need to do this for full scrna and ent_reclust

Idents(ent_reclust) <- "stage"
ent_reclust$stage <- droplevels(ent_reclust$stage)

cluster_use <- "integrated_snn_res.0.4"

### Run Slingshot per timepoint
sling_gob_time_list <- lapply(timepoints, function(tp) {
  print(glue("Processing timepoint: {tp}"))

  subset_obj <- subset(ent_reclust, idents = tp)
  
  tab <- table(subset_obj[[cluster_use]])
  small_clusters <- names(tab[tab < 20])
  
  Idents(subset_obj) <- cluster_use
  removed_cells <- WhichCells(subset_obj, idents = small_clusters)

  # subset to keep everything but the tiny clusters
   if(!is.null(removed_cells)){
  subset_filt <- subset(subset_obj, cells = removed_cells, invert = TRUE)
  subset_filt[[cluster_use]] <- droplevels(subset_filt[[cluster_use]])
   } else {subset_filt <- subset_obj}
  
  subset_filt <- RunSlingshot(
    subset_filt,
    group.by   = "integrated_snn_res.0.4",
    start.clus = "4",
    reducedDim = "INTE_PCA"
  )

  sling <- subset_filt@misc$slingshot$INTE_PCA$SlingPseudotime
  colnames(sling) <- paste0(colnames(sling), "_PCA")
  subset_filt@meta.data[, colnames(sling)] <- as.data.frame(sling)

  dp_subset_obj <- DimPlot2(
    subset_filt,
    features   = colnames(sling),
    cols       = "C",
    theme      = NoAxes(),
    reduction  = "INTE_UMAP"
  )
  
  ncols <- ncol(sling)

  # Start at minimum width of 5
  plt_width <- 5
  
  # If more than 4 columns, increase by 1 for every 2 columns over 4
  if (ncols > 4) {
    plt_width <- 5 + floor((ncols - 5) / 2) + 1
  }

  # optionally fix height for small numbers of columns
  plt_height <- ifelse(ncols < 3, 2, 4)
  
  save_ggplot_formats(
    plt           = dp_subset_obj,
    base_plot_dir = plots_folder,
    plt_name      = glue("slingshot_ent_reclust_{tp}"),
    width         = plt_width,
    height        = plt_height
  )

  list(sling = sling, seurat = subset_filt)
})
names(sling_gob_time_list) <- timepoints


### Run Slingshot per group of timepoints
sling_group_list <- lapply(names(groupings), function(grp) {
  print(glue("Processing group: {grp}"))

  tp_list <- groupings[[grp]]
  subset_obj <- subset(ent_reclust, idents = tp_list)
  
  tab <- table(subset_obj[[cluster_use]])
  small_clusters <- names(tab[tab < 20])
  
  Idents(subset_obj) <- cluster_use
  removed_cells <- WhichCells(subset_obj, idents = small_clusters)

  # subset to keep everything but the tiny clusters
 if(!is.null(removed_cells)){
  subset_filt <- subset(subset_obj, cells = removed_cells, invert = TRUE)
  subset_filt[[cluster_use]] <- droplevels(subset_filt[[cluster_use]])
 } else {subset_filt <- subset_obj}
  
  subset_filt <- RunSlingshot(
    subset_filt,
    group.by   = "integrated_snn_res.0.4",
    start.clus = "4",
    reducedDim = "INTE_PCA"
  )

  sling <- subset_filt@misc$slingshot$INTE_PCA$SlingPseudotime
  colnames(sling) <- paste0(colnames(sling), "_PCA")
  subset_filt@meta.data[, colnames(sling)] <- as.data.frame(sling)

  dp_subset_obj <- DimPlot2(
    subset_obj,
    features   = colnames(sling),
    cols       = "C",
    theme      = NoAxes(),
    reduction  = "INTE_UMAP"
  )

  ncols <- ncol(sling)

  # Start at minimum width of 5
  plt_width <- 5
  
  # If more than 4 columns, increase by 1 for every 2 columns over 4
  if (ncols > 4) {
    plt_width <- 5 + floor((ncols - 5) / 2) + 1
  }

  # optionally fix height for small numbers of columns
  plt_height <- ifelse(ncols < 3, 2, 4)
  
  save_ggplot_formats(
    plt           = dp_subset_obj,
    base_plot_dir = plots_folder,
    plt_name      = glue("slingshot_ent_reclust_{grp}"),
    width         = plt_width,
    height        = plt_height
  )
  list(sling = sling, seurat = subset_filt)
})
names(sling_group_list) <- names(groupings)


### both results together
sling_results <- c(
  sling_gob_time_list,
  sling_group_list
)

#sling_results


```

```{r}
sling_results <- load_object(file.path(harddrive,
                      "pseudotime/noc2_no11/saves/slingshot_all_ages2025.Rds")
                      )
```

#TFs and promedi in pseudotime

```{r}
multi_pseudotime_analysis <- function(scrna,
                                      pseudotime_cols = 
                                        c("pt1", "pt2", "pt3", "pt4"),
                                      module_cols =
                                        c("aggr.exp_promedi_poWe.dis_filter1",
                                          "aggr.exp_promedi_poWe.pro_filter1",
                                          "aggr.exp_promedi_preWe.dis_filter1",
                                          "aggr.exp_promedi_preWe.pro_filter1",
                                          "aggr.exp_cv_crypt_filter1",
                                          "aggr.exp_cv_villus_filter1"),
                                      n_bins = 10) {
  # 0) Extract data
  df <- FetchData(scrna, vars = c(pseudotime_cols, module_cols))
  
  # We standardize each module across all cells:
  # This puts every module on the same scale so we can compare
  # their dynamics along pseudotime, without being biased by differences
  # in overall expression or number of genes in the module.
  # After this, 0 means "average activity", positive = above average,
  # negative = below average.

  df[module_cols] <- scale(df[module_cols])
  
  # 1) Scale all pseudotimes to 0–1
  for (pt in pseudotime_cols) {
    df[[paste0(pt, "_scaled")]] <- (df[[pt]] - min(df[[pt]], na.rm = TRUE)) /
                                   (max(df[[pt]], na.rm = TRUE) - min(df[[pt]], na.rm = TRUE))
  }
  scaled_cols <- paste0(pseudotime_cols, "_scaled")
  
  # 2) Correlation table (now correlations on z-scored modules)
  cor_table <- expand.grid(pt = pseudotime_cols, module = module_cols) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(correlation = cor(df[[pt]], df[[module]], 
                             method = "spearman", 
                             use = "pairwise.complete.obs")) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # 3) Clean labels
  clean_label <- function(x) {
    lbl <- str_extract(x, "(?<=aggr\\.exp_(promedi|cv)_).*(?=_filter1)")
    ifelse(is.na(lbl), x, lbl)
  }
  cor_table$module_clean <- clean_label(cor_table$module)
  pt_labels <- setNames(scaled_cols, scaled_cols)
  cor_table$pt_clean <- dplyr::recode(cor_table$pt, !!!pt_labels)
  
  # 4) Prepare binned averaged z-scored data
  # # Once cells are assigned to pseudotime bins, we take the average
  # z-score in each bin for each module. This gives the "mean z-score"
  all_summaries <- list()
  for (pt_scaled in scaled_cols) {
    df$bin <- cut(df[[pt_scaled]], breaks = n_bins, labels = FALSE)
    df_summary <- df %>%
      filter(!is.na(bin)) %>%
      group_by(bin) %>%
      summarise(across(all_of(module_cols), mean, .names = "mean_{col}"),
                n = n(), .groups = "drop")
    df_summary$pt <- pt_scaled
    all_summaries[[pt_scaled]] <- df_summary
  }
  
  df_long <- bind_rows(all_summaries) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("mean_"),
                        names_to = "module", values_to = "mean_score") %>%
    mutate(module = gsub("^mean_", "", module),
           module_clean = clean_label(module),
           pt_clean = pt)
  
  # 5) Dotplot (still works; colors now show mean z-scores)
  dotplot <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = bin, y = module_clean,
                                 size = n, color = mean_score)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "A") +
    facet_wrap(~pt_clean, ncol = length(scaled_cols)) +
    labs(title = "Z-scored module dynamics along scaled pseudotime",
         x = "Scaled pseudotime (binned)", y = "Module (z-scored)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 9))
  
  # 6) Global color scale: symmetric around 0 (z-scores)
  col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2),
                                  c("navy", "white", "firebrick"))
  
  # 7) Heatmaps (z-score based)
  heatmaps <- list()
  for (pt_scaled in scaled_cols) {
    df_sub <- df_long %>% filter(pt == pt_scaled)
    mat <- df_sub %>%
      dplyr::select(bin, module_clean, mean_score) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = module_clean, 
                         values_from = mean_score) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(bin) %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(bin))
    
    mat_mat <- as.matrix(mat %>% dplyr::select(-bin))
    rownames(mat_mat) <- paste0("Bin_", mat$bin)
    
    hm <- Heatmap(mat_mat,
                  name = "Mean z-score",
                  col = col_fun,
                  cluster_rows = FALSE,
                  cluster_columns = FALSE,
                  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
                  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
                  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
                  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
                  column_title = pt_scaled,
                  row_title = "Pseudotime bins",
                  heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "Mean z-score",
                                              title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
                                              labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7)))
    heatmaps[[pt_scaled]] <- hm
  }
  
  return(list(cor_table = cor_table,
              dotplot = dotplot,
              heatmaps = heatmaps))
}

```

```{r}
res_promedi <- multi_pseudotime_analysis(scrna,
                                 pseudotime_cols =
                                   colnames(sling_ent_reclust),
                                 module_cols =
                                   c("aggr.exp_promedi_poWe.dis_filter1",
                                     "aggr.exp_promedi_poWe.pro_filter1",
                                     "aggr.exp_promedi_preWe.dis_filter1",
                                     "aggr.exp_promedi_preWe.pro_filter1"
                                                 ))


# Correlations
res_promedi$cor_table

# Dotplot
res_promedi$dotplot

promedi_hm <- draw(res_promedi$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_1_PCA +
                     res_promedi$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_2_PCA +
                     res_promedi$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_3_PCA +
                     res_promedi$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_4_PCA,
     merge_legends = TRUE)
```

```{r}
  save_ggplot_formats(plt = res_promedi$dotplot, 
                      base_plot_dir = plots_dir, 
                      create_plot_subdir = TRUE,
                      plt_name = "promedi_dotplot_pseudotime", 
                      width = 6, 
                      height = 3)

  save_ggplot_formats(plt = promedi_hm, 
                      base_plot_dir = plots_dir, 
                      create_plot_subdir = TRUE,
                      plot_obj = "heatmap",
                      plt_name = "promedi_heatmap_pseudotime", 
                      width = 6, 
                      height = 4)
```

```{r}
res_cv <- multi_pseudotime_analysis(scrna,
                                 pseudotime_cols =
                                   colnames(sling_ent_reclust),
                                 module_cols = c("all_crypts1",
                                                 "all_villi1",
                                                 "aggr.exp_cv_preWe.crypts1",
                                                 "aggr.exp_cv_preWe.villi1",
                                                 "aggr.exp_cv_poWe.crypts1",
                                                 "aggr.exp_cv_poWe.villi1"  
                                                 ))

# Correlations
res_cv$cor_table

# Dotplot
res_cv$dotplot

cv_hm <- draw(res_cv$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_1_PCA +
                res_cv$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_2_PCA +
                res_cv$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_3_PCA + 
                res_cv$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_4_PCA,
              merge_legends = TRUE)
```

```{r}
  save_ggplot_formats(plt = res_cv$dotplot, 
                      base_plot_dir = plots_dir, 
                      create_plot_subdir = TRUE,
                      plt_name = "crypt_villus_dotplot_pseudotime", 
                      width = 6, 
                      height = 3)

  save_ggplot_formats(plt = cv_hm, 
                      base_plot_dir = plots_dir, 
                      create_plot_subdir = TRUE,
                      plot_obj = "heatmap",
                      plt_name = "crypt_villus_heatmap_pseudotime", 
                      width = 6, 
                      height = 4)
```

```{r}
res_moor <- multi_pseudotime_analysis(scrna,
                                 pseudotime_cols = 
                                   colnames(sling_ent_reclust),
                                 module_cols = names(marker_genes)) #moor markers

# Correlations
res_moor$cor_table

# Dotplot
res_moor$dotplot

moor_hm <- draw(res_moor$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_1_PCA +
                  res_moor$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_2_PCA +
                  res_moor$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_3_PCA + 
                  res_moor$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_4_PCA,
                merge_legends = TRUE)
```

```{r}
  save_ggplot_formats(plt = res_moor$dotplot, 
                      base_plot_dir = plots_dir, 
                      create_plot_subdir = TRUE,
                      plt_name = "moor_dotplot_pseudotime", 
                      width = 6, 
                      height = 3)

  save_ggplot_formats(plt = moor_hm, 
                      base_plot_dir = plots_dir, 
                      create_plot_subdir = TRUE,
                      plot_obj = "heatmap",
                      plt_name = "moor_heatmap_pseudotime", 
                      width = 6, 
                      height = 4)
```

#transcription factors in pseudotime
```{r}
#this needs the pseudotime calculation and dorothea tf_acvitiy scores calculated (see dorothea_2025/dorothea_v2025 - the scripts need to be adjusted)
#
# we only do this on the enterocyte_reclustering data
# Define the folder path for Enterocyte datasets
ent_folder <- file.path(
  harddrive,
  "subsets/subsets_2025/save/noc2_no11/ent"  
)

#enterocyte reclustered
scrna <- load_object(file.path(
  ent_folder, 
  "scrna_ent_inf_pseudotime.Rds" 
))
```

```{r}
calc_ht_size <- function(ht, unit = "in") {
  pdf(NULL)
  ht = draw(ht)
  w = ComplexHeatmap:::width(ht)
  w = grid::convertX(w, unit, valueOnly = TRUE)
  h = ComplexHeatmap:::height(ht)
  h = grid::convertY(h, unit, valueOnly = TRUE)
  dev.off()
  c(w, h)
}


```

```{r}
plots_folder <- file.path(harddrive,"pseudotime/noc2_no11/plots/hm2")
dir.create(plots_folder)

res_topN <- plot_top_tf_heatmaps(
  seuratobject = scrna,
  tf_csv = file.path(charts_folder, "acts_decoupler_scrna_size5.csv"),
  pseudotime_cols = colnames(sling_ent_reclust),
  #plots_folder = ,
  n_segments = 10,
  scale_pseudotime = TRUE,
  top_n = 20
)
```

```{r}
plot_top_tf_heatmaps <- function(
    seuratobject,
    tf_input,                     # either path to CSV or a dataframe
    pseudotime_cols,
    out_dir,
    n_bins = 10,
    top_n = 20,
    scale_pseudotime = TRUE,
    subset_condition_pattern = NULL,
    plt_name = ""
) {

  save_formats = c("png", "pdf")

  # --- Load or accept TF activity input
  if (is.character(tf_input)) {
    message("Reading TF activity table from file...")
    tf_activities <- read.csv(tf_input, header = TRUE)
  } else if (is.data.frame(tf_input)) {
    message("Using provided TF activity data frame...")
    tf_activities <- tf_input
  } else {
    stop("`tf_input` must be either a path to a CSV file or a data frame.")
  }
  
  # --- Optional filtering by pattern (e.g. "d01" or "preweaning")
  if (!is.null(subset_condition_pattern)) {
    tf_activities <- tf_activities %>%
      filter(str_detect(condition, subset_condition_pattern))
    message(glue("Filtered TF data by pattern:",
                 "'{subset_condition_pattern}' 
                 : {nrow(tf_activities)} rows remain"))
  }
  
  # --- Reshape TF activities
  tf_matrix <- tf_activities %>%
    select(source, condition, score) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = source, values_from = score) %>%
    column_to_rownames("condition")
  
  # --- Keep only cells present in Seurat object
  common_cells <- intersect(rownames(seuratobject@meta.data),
                            rownames(tf_matrix))
  if (length(common_cells) == 0) {
    stop("No overlapping cell names found")
  }
  
  tf_matrix <- tf_matrix[common_cells, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # --- Scale TF activities (z-score per TF)
  tf_matrix <- scale(tf_matrix)
  
  # --- Iterate over pseudotime columns
  for (pt_col in pseudotime_cols) {
    message(glue("Processing {pt_col} ..."))
    
    pt <- FetchData(seuratobject, pt_col)[common_cells, , drop = FALSE]
    colnames(pt) <- "pseudotime"
    
    df <- data.frame(pt, tf_matrix)
    df <- df[!is.na(df$pseudotime), ]
    
    if (nrow(df) == 0) {
      warning(glue("No valid pseudotime values for {pt_col}, skipping."))
      next
    }
    
    # --- Optionally rescale pseudotime
    if (scale_pseudotime) {
      df$pseudotime <- scales::rescale(df$pseudotime, to = c(0, 1))
    }
    
    # --- Define pseudotime segments
    breaks <- seq(0, 1, length.out = n_bins + 1)
    df$segment <- cut(df$pseudotime,
                      breaks = breaks,
                      labels = paste("bin", 1:n_bins),
                      include.lowest = TRUE)
    
    # --- Compute mean TF activity per segment
    seg_means <- df %>%
      group_by(segment) %>%
      summarise(across(-pseudotime, mean, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      pivot_longer(-segment, names_to = "TF", values_to = "activity")
    
    # --- Select top_n TFs overall
    top_tfs <- seg_means %>%
      group_by(TF) %>%
      summarise(mean_activity = mean(activity, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      slice_max(order_by = mean_activity, n = top_n) %>%
      pull(TF)
    
    seg_means_top <- seg_means %>%
      filter(TF %in% top_tfs) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = segment, values_from = activity) %>%
      column_to_rownames("TF")
    
      # --- Order genes by peak bin (staircase) ---
    mat <- as.matrix(seg_means_top)
    peak_bin <- apply(mat, 1, which.max)
    row_order <- order(peak_bin)
    mat <- mat[row_order, ]
    
        # --- Add suffix for condition subset
    subset_label <- ""
    if (!is.null(subset_condition_pattern)) {
      safe_pattern <- subset_condition_pattern |>
        str_replace_all("\\|", "_")              # replace | with _
      subset_label <- glue("_subset-{safe_pattern}")
    }
    
    write.xlsx(mat,file.path(out_dir,glue("TF-matrix_{plt_name}_{pt_col}_top{top_n}_n_bins{n_bins}",
                      "{subset_label}.xlsx")), rowNames = TRUE)
    
    if(0){
    # --- Generate ComplexHeatmap
    ht <- ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(mat,
                  name = "TF activity (z-score)",
                  cluster_rows = FALSE,
                  cluster_columns = FALSE,
                  show_row_names = TRUE,
                  show_column_names = TRUE,
                  column_title = glue("{pt_col} order (n_bins={n_bins}", 
                                      "top_n={top_n})"))
    
    # --- Auto-calculate width/height
    dims <- calc_ht_size(ht, unit = "in")
    width <- dims[1]
    height <- dims[2]
    


    # --- Save
    save_ggplot_formats(
      ht,
      base_plot_dir = out_dir,
      plt_name = glue("TF_heatmap_{plt_name}_{pt_col}_top{top_n}_n_bins{n_bins}",
                      "{subset_label}"),
      plot_obj = "heatmap",
      formats = save_formats,
      width = width -2,
      height = height + 6
    )
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
# Only day 25 subset
plot_top_tf_heatmaps(
  seuratobject = sling_results$d25$seurat,
  tf_input = tf_csv,
  pseudotime_cols = "slingPseudotime_1_PCA",
  out_dir = plots_folder,
  subset_condition_pattern = "d25",
  n_bins = 10,
  top_n = 100,
  plt_name = "ent_top100_d25"
)

# Only preweaning subset
plot_top_tf_heatmaps(
  seuratobject = sling_results$preweaning$seurat,
  tf_input = tf_csv,
  pseudotime_cols = c("slingPseudotime_2_PCA","slingPseudotime_3_PCA"),
  out_dir = plots_folder,
  subset_condition_pattern = "d01|d05|d10",
  n_bins = 10,
  top_n = 100,
  plt_name = "ent_top100"
)
```

```{r}
moor_cols <- paste0("Cluster.",1:5)

res_moor_preWe <- multi_pseudotime_analysis(sling_results$preweaning$seurat,
                                 pseudotime_cols = 
                                   c("slingPseudotime_2_PCA",
                                     "slingPseudotime_3_PCA"),
                                 module_cols = moor_cols
)

res_moor_d25 <- multi_pseudotime_analysis(sling_results$d25$seurat,
                                 pseudotime_cols = 
                                   "slingPseudotime_1_PCA",
                                 module_cols = moor_cols
)


res_moor_preWe$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_2_PCA@column_title <- "PreWe: Lineage 2"
res_moor_preWe$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_3_PCA@column_title <- "PreWe: Lineage 3"
res_moor_d25$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_1_PCA@column_title   <- "d25: Lineage 1"

moor_hm <- draw(
  res_moor_preWe$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_2_PCA +
  res_moor_preWe$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_3_PCA +
  res_moor_d25$heatmaps$slingPseudotime_1_PCA,
  merge_legends = TRUE
)

save_ggplot_formats(plt = moor_hm, 
                      base_plot_dir = plots_folder, 
                      create_plot_subdir = TRUE,
                      plot_obj = "heatmap",
                      plt_name = 
                        "moor_heatmap_pseudotime_pre_post_weaning_enterocyte_zscore",
                      width = 4, 
                      height = 3
                    )
```

```{r}
pseudotime_bin_DE_multi <- function(scrna,
                                    pseudotime_cols,
                                    n_bins = 10,
                                    top_n = 50,
                                    l2fc_thresh = 1,
                                    padj_thresh = 0.05) {
  
  res_list <- list()
  
  for (pt_name in pseudotime_cols) {
    cat("Processing pseudotime:", pt_name, "\n")
    
    # Extract pseudotime
    if (!pt_name %in% colnames(scrna@meta.data)) {
      stop(paste0("Column ", pt_name, " not found in Seurat object metadata"))
    }
    pt_vec <- scrna@meta.data[[pt_name]]
    
    # 1) Bin pseudotime
    scrna$pt_bin <- cut(pt_vec, breaks = n_bins, labels = FALSE)
    Idents(scrna) <- scrna$pt_bin
    
    # 2) DE for all bins
    markers_raw <- FindAllMarkers(scrna,
                                  only.pos = TRUE,
                                  logfc.threshold = 0,
                                  min.pct = 0)
    
    # 3) DE filtering
    markers <- markers_raw %>%
      filter(avg_log2FC > l2fc_thresh & p_val_adj < padj_thresh)
    
    # 4) Split by bin & enforce numeric order
    markers_split <- split(markers, markers$cluster)
    bin_ids <- sort(as.numeric(names(markers_split)))
    
    markers_split <- markers_split[as.character(bin_ids)]
    all_bins <- as.character(bin_ids)
    
    # 5) Unique genes per bin
    unique_genes <- lapply(all_bins, function(b) {
      genes_here  <- markers_split[[b]]$gene
      genes_other <- unique(unlist(markers_split[all_bins != b], use.names = FALSE))
      setdiff(genes_here, genes_other)
    })
    names(unique_genes) <- all_bins
    
    # 6) Top N unique genes per bin
    top_unique <- lapply(all_bins, function(b) {
      df <- markers_split[[b]] %>% filter(gene %in% unique_genes[[b]])
      df %>% arrange(p_val_adj) %>% head(top_n)
    })
    names(top_unique) <- all_bins
    
    # 7) All top unique genes
    all_unique_topn <- unique(unlist(lapply(top_unique, function(x) x$gene)))
    
    # 8) Average expression per bin
    avg_expr <- AverageExpression(scrna,
                                  group.by = "pt_bin",
                                  features = all_unique_topn)$RNA
    
    # 9) z-score
    heat_mat <- t(scale(t(avg_expr)))
    heat_mat[is.na(heat_mat)] <- 0
    
    # 10) Gene ordering (staircase)
    peak_bin <- apply(heat_mat, 1, which.max)
    names(peak_bin) <- rownames(heat_mat)
    
    ord <- unlist(lapply(1:n_bins, function(b) {
      genes_in_bin <- names(peak_bin)[peak_bin == b]
      if (length(genes_in_bin) > 1) {
        genes_in_bin <- genes_in_bin[order(heat_mat[genes_in_bin, b], decreasing = TRUE)]
      }
      genes_in_bin
    }))
    
    mat2 <- heat_mat[ord, , drop = FALSE]
    
    # 11) Heatmap
    hm <- Heatmap(
      mat2,
      name = "z-score",
      cluster_rows = FALSE,
      cluster_columns = FALSE,
      column_labels = paste0("bin_", 1:n_bins),
      column_title = pt_name,
      col = colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("navy", "white", "firebrick"))
    )
    
    # 12) Results
    res_list[[pt_name]] <- list(
      markers_raw = markers_raw,
      markers = markers,
      markers_split = markers_split,
      unique_genes = unique_genes,
      top_n_unique = top_unique,
      heatmap_matrix = mat2,
      heatmap = hm
    )
  }
  
  return(res_list)
}

```

```{r}
# Pseudotime columns to analyze
pseudotime_columns <- c("slingPseudotime_2_PCA", "slingPseudotime_3_PCA")

scrna <- sling_results$preweaning$seurat

# Run the analysis
res_prwe <- pseudotime_bin_DE_multi(
  scrna =  sling_results$preweaning$seurat,
  pseudotime_cols = pseudotime_columns,
  n_bins = 10,
  top_n = 10,
  l2fc_thresh = 1,
  padj_thresh = 0.05
)

# Draw heatmaps
draw(res_prwe[["slingPseudotime_2_PCA"]]$heatmap)
draw(res_prwe[["slingPseudotime_3_PCA"]]$heatmap)

pseudotime_bin_DE_multi(
  scrna =  sling_results$d25$seurat,
  pseudotime_cols = "slingPseudotime_1_PCA",
  n_bins = 10,
  top_n = 10,
  l2fc_thresh = 1,
  padj_thresh = 0.05
)

draw(res_powe[["slingPseudotime_1_PCA"]]$heatmap)

```

```{r}
plots_folder <- file.path(harddrive,"pseudotime/pseudotime_DE")

save_ggplot_formats(plt = res_powe[["slingPseudotime_1_PCA"]]$heatmap, 
                      base_plot_dir = plots_folder, 
                      create_plot_subdir = TRUE,
                      plot_obj = "heatmap",
                      plt_name = 
                        "powe_heatmap",
                      width = 3.5, 
                      height = 14
                    )

save_ggplot_formats(plt = res_prwe[["slingPseudotime_2_PCA"]]$heatmap, 
                      base_plot_dir = plots_folder, 
                      create_plot_subdir = TRUE,
                      plot_obj = "heatmap",
                      plt_name = 
                        "prwe_heatmap_lineage2",
                      width = 3.5, 
                      height = 14
                    )

save_ggplot_formats(plt = res_prwe[["slingPseudotime_3_PCA"]]$heatmap, 
                      base_plot_dir = plots_folder, 
                      create_plot_subdir = TRUE,
                      plot_obj = "heatmap",
                      plt_name = 
                        "prwe_heatmap_lineage3",
                      width = 3.5, 
                      height = 14
                    )
```

```{r}
go_folder <- file.path(harddrive,"pseudotime/GO")

up_compare_GO <- load_object(file.path(go_folder,"GO_up_postweaning_pt1.Rds"))
up_compare_GO_pw2 <- load_object(file.path(go_folder,"GO_up_preweaning_pt2.Rds"))
up_compare_GO_pw3 <- load_object(file.path(go_folder,"GO_up_preweaning_pt3.Rds"))

```

```{r}
p.cutoff <- 0.05
comparison <- "GO"
ont <- "bp"
count.cutoff <- 10
topN <- 3
clust_met <- "complete"


enterocyte_de_markers <- getsheets(
  filename = "H:/231248/NTFS_3.64TB/suppl_tbls_for_paper/pseudotime markers/combined_tables_pseudotime_enterocyte.xlsx",
  startrow = 1)

res_up <- split(enterocyte_de_markers$enterocyte.preweaning_pt3,
                enterocyte_de_markers$enterocyte.preweaning_pt3$bin)

res_up <- res_up[order(as.numeric(names(res_up)))]

res_up <- lapply(res_up,function(x){
  x %>% pull(symbol)
  }
                 )
condition="prWe3_cap10_superslim2"
  up_compare_GO_pw3 <- compareCluster(res_up,
                             fun = enrichGO,
                             OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db",
                             keyType = "SYMBOL",
                             ont = ont,
                             pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                             pvalueCutoff  = p.cutoff,
                             readable = TRUE
                             )
  
  write.csv(as.data.frame(up_compare_GO_pw3),
              file = file.path(charts_folder, "compare_genes_ht_GO_pw3.csv"),
              row.names = FALSE)
    
    write.xlsx(as.data.frame(up_compare_GO_pw3), file = 
                 file.path(charts_folder, "compare_genes_ht_GO_pw3.xlsx"))
    
process_comparison_results(up_compare_GO_pw3,
                           condition, 
                           topN, 
                           count.cutoff, 
                           clust_met, 
                           pos_color_low, 
                           pos_color,
                           plots_folder = go_folder, 
                           charts_folder = go_folder, 
                           truncate_go_term)

save_object(up_compare_GO,file.path(plots_folder,"GO_up_postweaning_pt1.Rds"))
save_object(up_compare_GO_pw2,file.path(plots_folder,"GO_up_preweaning_pt2.Rds"))
save_object(up_compare_GO_pw3,file.path(plots_folder,"GO_up_preweaning_pt3.Rds"))
```

```{r}
#gob_order <- c("5", "7", "2", "4", "3", "0", "6","1")

scrna_goblet <- RunSlingshot(
    scrna_goblet,
    group.by   = "RNA_snn_res.0.7",
    start.clus = "5",
    reducedDim = "INTE_PCA"
  )

sling_gob <- scrna_goblet@misc$slingshot$INTE_PCA$SlingPseudotime
colnames(sling_gob) <- paste0(colnames(sling_gob),"_PCA")
scrna_goblet@meta.data[,colnames(sling_gob)] <- as.data.frame(sling_gob)

dp_scrna_gob <- DimPlot2(scrna_goblet, 
                     features = colnames(sling_gob), 
                     cols = "C", 
                     theme = NoAxes(),
                     reduction = "harmony_UMAP"
                     )

save_ggplot_formats(plt = dp_scrna_gob, 
                      base_plot_dir = plots_folder, 
                      #create_plot_subdir = TRUE,
                      plt_name = "slingshot_full_scrna_goblet_uninf", 
                      width = 5, 
                      height = 4
                    )
```

```{r}
plots_folder <- file.path(harddrive,"pseudotime/noc2_no11/plots",
                          "slingshot_agewise/goblet")
dir.create(plots_folder)

# Example subsets by stage
timepoints <- c("d01", "d05", "d10", "d25")
groupings <- list(
  #"d01_d05"    = c("d01", "d05"),
  #"d05_d10"    = c("d05", "d10"),
  "preweaning" = c("d01", "d05", "d10")
)

#we need to do this for full scrna and goblet

Idents(scrna_goblet) <- "stage"
scrna_goblet$stage <- droplevels(as.factor(scrna_goblet$stage))

cluster_use <- "RNA_snn_res.0.7"
### Run Slingshot per timepoint
sling_gob_time_list <- lapply(timepoints, function(tp) {
  print(glue("Processing timepoint: {tp}"))

  subset_obj <- subset(scrna_goblet, idents = tp)
  
  tab <- table(subset_obj[[cluster_use]])
  small_clusters <- names(tab[tab < 20])
  
  Idents(subset_obj) <- cluster_use
  
  removed_cells <- WhichCells(subset_obj, idents = small_clusters)

  # subset to keep everything but the tiny clusters
   if(!is.null(removed_cells)){
     subset_filt <- subset(subset_obj, cells = removed_cells, invert = TRUE)
     subset_filt[[cluster_use]] <- droplevels(subset_filt[[cluster_use]])
   } else {subset_filt <- subset_obj}
  
  subset_filt <- RunSlingshot(
    subset_filt,
    group.by   =  cluster_use,
    start.clus = "5",
    reducedDim = "INTE_PCA"
  )

  sling <- subset_filt@misc$slingshot$INTE_PCA$SlingPseudotime
  colnames(sling) <- paste0(colnames(sling), "_PCA")
  subset_filt@meta.data[, colnames(sling)] <- as.data.frame(sling)

  dp_subset_obj <- DimPlot2(
    subset_filt,
    features   = colnames(sling),
    cols       = "C",
    theme      = NoAxes(),
    reduction  = "harmony_UMAP"
  )
  
  ncols <- ncol(sling)

  # Start at minimum width of 5
  plt_width <- 5
  
  # If more than 4 columns, increase by 1 for every 2 columns over 4
  if (ncols > 4) {
    plt_width <- 5 + floor((ncols - 5) / 2) + 1
  }

  # optionally fix height for small numbers of columns
  plt_height <- ifelse(ncols < 3, 2, 4)
  
  save_ggplot_formats(
    plt           = dp_subset_obj,
    base_plot_dir = plots_folder,
    plt_name      = glue("slingshot_goblet_{tp}"),
    width         = plt_width,
    height        = plt_height
  )

  list(sling = sling, seurat = subset_filt)
})
names(sling_gob_time_list) <- timepoints


### Run Slingshot per group of timepoints
sling_goblet_group_list <- lapply(names(groupings), function(grp) {
  print(glue("Processing group: {grp}"))

  tp_list <- groupings[[grp]]
  subset_obj <- subset(scrna_goblet, idents = tp_list)
  
  tab <- table(subset_obj[[cluster_use]])
  small_clusters <- names(tab[tab < 20])
  
  Idents(subset_obj) <- cluster_use
  removed_cells <- WhichCells(subset_obj, idents = small_clusters)

  # subset to keep everything but the tiny clusters
 if(!is.null(removed_cells)){
  subset_filt <- subset(subset_obj, cells = removed_cells, invert = TRUE)
  subset_filt[[cluster_use]] <- droplevels(subset_filt[[cluster_use]])
 } else {subset_filt <- subset_obj}
  
  subset_filt <- RunSlingshot(
    subset_filt,
    group.by   =  cluster_use,
    start.clus = "5",
    reducedDim = "INTE_PCA"
  )

  sling <- subset_filt@misc$slingshot$INTE_PCA$SlingPseudotime
  colnames(sling) <- paste0(colnames(sling), "_PCA")
  subset_filt@meta.data[, colnames(sling)] <- as.data.frame(sling)

  dp_subset_obj <- DimPlot2(
    subset_filt,
    features   = colnames(sling),
    cols       = "C",
    theme      = NoAxes(),
    reduction  = "harmony_UMAP"
  )

  ncols <- ncol(sling)

  # Start at minimum width of 5
  plt_width <- 5
  
  # If more than 4 columns, increase by 1 for every 2 columns over 4
  if (ncols > 4) {
    plt_width <- 5 + floor((ncols - 5) / 2) + 1
  }

  # optionally fix height for small numbers of columns
  plt_height <- ifelse(ncols < 3, 2, 4)
  
  save_ggplot_formats(
    plt           = dp_subset_obj,
    base_plot_dir = plots_folder,
    plt_name      = glue("slingshot_goblet_{grp}"),
    width         = plt_width,
    height        = plt_height
  )
  list(sling = sling, seurat = subset_filt)
})
names(sling_goblet_group_list) <- names(groupings)

 
# both results together
 sling_goblet_results <- c(
   sling_gob_time_list,
   sling_goblet_group_list
 )
```

```{r}
# preweaning subset goblet
plot_top_tf_heatmaps(
  seuratobject = sling_group_list$preweaning$seurat,
  tf_input = tf_csv,
  pseudotime_cols = c("slingPseudotime_1_PCA","slingPseudotime_3_PCA"),
  out_dir = plots_folder,
  subset_condition_pattern = "d01|d05|d10",
  n_bins = 10,
  top_n = 20,
  plt_name = "goblet_prewe"
)

# preweaning subset goblet
plot_top_tf_heatmaps(
  seuratobject = sling_group_list$preweaning$seurat,
  tf_input = tf_csv,
  pseudotime_cols = c("slingPseudotime_1_PCA","slingPseudotime_3_PCA"),
  out_dir = plots_folder,
  subset_condition_pattern = "d01|d05|d10",
  n_bins = 4,
  top_n = 100,
  plt_name = "goblet_prewe_top100_4bin_tbl"
)
```

```{r}
pseudotime_bin_DE_multi(
  scrna = sling_group_list$preweaning$seurat,
  pseudotime_cols = c("slingPseudotime_1_PCA","slingPseudotime_3_PCA"),
  top_n = 50,
  n_bins = 4,
  plots_folder = plots_folder
)
```

```{r}
p.cutoff <- 0.05
comparison <- "GO"
ont <- "bp"
count.cutoff <- 5
topN <- 5
clust_met <- "complete"


goblet_de_markers <- getsheets(
  filename = file.path(harddrive,"pseudotime/noc2_no11/plots/slingshot_agewise/",
  "goblet/markers_goblet_4_bins/combined_tables_pseudotime_goblet_preweaning_4bin.xlsx"),
  startrow = 1)

goblet_de_markers_filtered <- lapply(goblet_de_markers, function(df) {
  df %>% 
    dplyr::filter(!grepl("ribo|mito", description, ignore.case = TRUE))
})

walk(names(goblet_de_markers_filtered), function(nm) {
  
  message("Processing: ", nm)

  # 1. Extract DE table for this element
  df <- goblet_de_markers_filtered[[nm]]

  # 2. Split by pseudotime bin
  res_up <- split(df, df$bin)

  # 3. Order bins numerically
  res_up <- res_up[order(as.numeric(names(res_up)))]

  # 4. Keep only gene symbols
  res_up <- lapply(res_up,function(x){ x %>% pull(symbol) })

  # 5. Run GO
  up_compare_GO <- compareCluster(
    res_up,
    fun = enrichGO,
    OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db",
    keyType = "SYMBOL",
    ont = ont,
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff = p.cutoff,
    readable = TRUE
  )

  # 6. Save CSV + XLSX
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(up_compare_GO),
    file = file.path(charts_folder, glue("GO_{nm}_up_nomito_ribo.csv")),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  write.xlsx(
    as.data.frame(up_compare_GO),
    file = file.path(charts_folder, glue("GO_{nm}_up_nomito_ribo.xlsx"))
  )

  # 7. Process + plot
  process_comparison_results(
    up_compare_GO,
    glue("{nm}_up_nomito_ribo"),
    topN,
    count.cutoff,
    clust_met,
    pos_color_low,
    pos_color,
    plots_folder = go_folder,
    charts_folder = go_folder,
    truncate_go_term
  )

  # 8. Save RDS
  save_object(up_compare_GO, file.path(go_folder, glue("{nm}_top_{topN}_up_nomito_ribo.Rds")))
})

```
